message:
rpc: formatting cleanup + session snapshot for export

Code style improvements:
- Consistent line breaks in chained method calls
- Simplified tuple destructuring in maybe_auto_compact
- Consistent error mapping formatting for session locks

Functional change in export_html:
- Clone session before passing to export_html to avoid holding
  the lock during async HTML generation
- Prevents potential deadlocks on long-running exports

Test update:
- retry_tests now uses Arc<Mutex<Session::in_memory()>> pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
